Description: Masked or anonymized identifier for a specific analyst, unique and non-revealing
Number of analysts who belong to this estimator (broker/institution) and have made forecasts on this stock
Ratio of correct_forecast_times1 to total_forecast_times1, measuring "ever-hit" forecast accuracy of the analyst
Ratio of correct_forecast_times2 to total_forecast_times2, measuring "horizon-hit" forecast accuracy of the analyst
Negative standard deviation of (forecast value - actual value); less negative value means more consistent forecasts (for price targets, actual is horizon close price)
Number of forecasts in total_forecast_times1 where the price target was ever hit between day after forecast and today ("ever-hit" rule)
Number of forecasts in total_forecast_times2 where price target was hit exactly on the horizon date ("horizon-hit" rule)
Proportion of correct revisions out of total revisions (correct_revision_times divided by total_revision_times)
Number of forecast revisions by the analyst that moved closer to the eventually realized/actual value
Rank of the analyst’s accuracy1 among all analysts covering the same stock
Normalized accuracy1 score for the analyst: (accuracy1 - min)/(max - min) among analysts covering the same stock
Rank of the analyst’s accuracy2 among all analysts covering the same stock
Normalized accuracy2 score for the analyst: (accuracy2 - min)/(max - min) among analysts covering the same stock
Rank of the analyst's consistency among analysts covering the same stock (lower rank indicates higher consistency)
Normalized consistency score for the analyst: (consistency - min(consistency)) / (max(consistency) - min(consistency)), range [0,1] among peer analysts on the same stock
Rank (ordinal position) of the analyst's correct_revision_ratio relative to other analysts covering the same equity on that date
Normalized score of the analyst's correct_revision_ratio in the context of the peer set, on a 0–1 scale based on the minimum and maximum among peers
Total number of forecasts made by the analyst in the lookback window, counted for the "ever-hit" (rule 1) accuracy calculation
Total number of forecasts made by the analyst in the lookback window, considered for the "horizon-hit" (rule 2) accuracy calculation
Total number of forecast revisions (updates) made by the analyst over the period considered
An anonymized, masked identifier code for the individual analyst
Total number of forecasts the analyst made in the lookback period: [Today-504, min{Today-126, Today-horizon_days}]
Number of distinct analysts within the estimator who have made forecasts for this stock

Number of forecast revisions judged to be correct (i.e., moved closer to the realized value)

rank(consistency) over analysts covering the same stock
